title: Israel’s Expanding Ground Assault in Lebanon Meets Resistance in Hilltop Town
summary_full: The town of Khiam’s location on high ground just a few miles north of the border between Israel and Lebanon has made it coveted territory over multiple conflicts.
summary_public: The town of Khiam’s location on high ground just a few miles north of the border between Israel and Lebanon has made it coveted territory over multiple conflicts.
